# LamboMoon

LamboMoon is a community-curated crypto discovery site.

Core ideas:
- index broadly
- curate selectively
- boost the best
- focus on fresh and upcoming crypto opportunities

Key URLs:
- Homepage: https://www.lambomoon.io/
- Trending: https://www.lambomoon.io/trending
- Movers: https://www.lambomoon.io/movers
- About: https://www.lambomoon.io/about
- Project detail pages: https://www.lambomoon.io/project/<id>

Machine-friendly endpoints:
- Trending projects JSON: https://www.lambomoon.io/api/projects/trending
- Upcoming projects JSON: https://www.lambomoon.io/api/projects/upcoming

Interpretation notes:
- "Boost" means a positive community signal.
- Projects may be listed, fresh, upcoming, prelaunch, or watching.
- LamboMoon combines market context with community conviction.
